expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.name: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio Coding Plan Pro
expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.snapshot: Pro plan is listed at ¥200/month, with 6,000 requests per 5 hours, 45,000 requests per week, and 90,000 requests per month; official docs say it can be configured in Claude Code with the Coding Plan Anthropic-compatible Base URL and dedicated API key.
expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.why_not_pure_api: The plan page says it is for AI coding tools such as Claude Code/OpenClaw and warns against direct non-interactive API use.

expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.name: Z.ai GLM Coding Plan
expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.snapshot: Official Z.ai docs describe GLM Coding Plan subscription for coding models and setup through Z Code / Claude Code-style coding tools.
expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.why_not_pure_api: The plan is positioned as a coding plan for tools rather than generic pay-as-you-go API usage.

expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.name: Kimi Code membership
expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.snapshot: Official Kimi Code docs state that member API Key integration can be used on supported platforms and that individual personal use in Claude Code and Roo Code is permitted; plan credits refresh according to the billing cycle.
expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.why_not_pure_api: It is a membership benefit for Kimi Code workflows, not a generic API-only recommendation.

expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.name: MiniMax M2.x coding plan / Claude Code integration
expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.snapshot: Official MiniMax docs have a Claude Code page for using M2.x in AI coding tools and configuring the Anthropic-compatible endpoint.
expected_claude_code_provider_compatible.why_not_pure_api: Accept only if the executor finds a current coding-plan/subscription page rather than a generic token-price page.

china_plan_focus: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio Coding Plan
MiniMax coding plan / M2.x Claude Code integration
product_only_examples_not_counted_as_cla: Tongyi Lingma product subscription unless official docs show a Claude Code provider path
TRAE product subscription unless official docs show a Claude Code provider path
Qoder product subscription unless official docs show a Claude Code provider path
Tencent Cloud CodeBuddy IDE subscription unless official docs show a Claude Code provider path
Qodo IDE/CLI quality tooling subscription unless official docs show a Claude Code provider path
SiliconFlow or other compute-rental/model-gateway/API-aggregator platforms unless a fixed coding plan directly usable as a Claude Code provider is documented
accepted_subscription_examples: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio Coding Plan
Anthropic Claude Max / Pro if documented as a subscription usable in the target workflow
OpenAI ChatGPT Team / Plus / Pro if documented as a coding subscription rather than direct API
Google Gemini Advanced / AI Pro if documented as a coding subscription rather than direct API

quota_snapshot_examples.name: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio Coding Plan Pro
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: ¥200/month; 6,000 requests per 5 hours; 45,000 requests per week; 90,000 requests per month; only for interactive coding tools such as Claude Code/OpenClaw, not direct API automation.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: Z.ai GLM Coding Plan
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Lite about 80 prompts per 5 hours / 400 per week; Pro about 400 per 5 hours / 2,000 per week; Max about 1,600 per 5 hours / 8,000 per week; supports Claude Code, Roo Code, Cline, OpenCode, OpenClaw and others; API calls are billed separately and do not use coding-plan quota.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: Kimi Code membership
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Kimi Code membership benefit; 5-hour token quota supports approximately 300-1,200 API calls, up to 30 concurrent requests; Kimi Code docs permit personal use in Claude Code and Roo Code; quotas refresh on a 7-day rolling cycle.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: MiniMax Token Plan / former Coding Plan
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Standard plans: Starter 1,500 M2.7 requests per 5 hours; Plus 4,500 per 5 hours; Max 15,000 per 5 hours. Highspeed plans: Plus-Highspeed 4,500 M2.7-highspeed requests per 5 hours; Max-Highspeed 15,000; Ultra-Highspeed 30,000.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: Cursor Pro / Pro+ / Ultra
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Individual plans include agent usage charged against included usage: Pro $20 of API agent usage plus bonus, roughly 225 Sonnet 4 / 550 Gemini / 500 GPT-5 requests for a median user; Pro+ $70 included; Ultra $400 included.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: Windsurf Pro / Teams / Enterprise
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Windsurf uses prompt credits/quotas for Cascade and premium models; documentation states paid Pro/Max, Teams and Enterprise plans, add-on credits, automatic refills, and plan-dependent model/usage limits that must be checked on the current pricing page.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: Augment Indie / Standard / Max
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Indie $20/month includes 40,000 credits; Standard $60/developer/month includes 130,000 credits; Max $200/developer/month includes 450,000 credits; auto top-up $15 per 24,000 credits; credits can be used for coding agent and code review.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: Qodo Developer / Teams
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Developer includes IDE/CLI credits and Teams lists larger credit pools for Qodo's own tools. This may be a useful coding subscription comparison, but do not count it as Claude Code provider compatible unless current official docs show a Claude Code provider path.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: JetBrains AI Pro / Ultimate
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Quota is measured in AI Credits. Published tiers include AI Pro and AI Ultimate with monthly dedicated quotas; each AI Credit corresponds to about $1 USD, and JetBrains gives rough per-credit request equivalents such as about 10 AI Chat code-generation requests or 40 editor code-generation requests.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: Replit Core / Pro
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Core is $25/month or $20/month billed annually and includes $25 monthly credits; Pro is $100/month or $95/month billed annually and includes $100 monthly credits, stronger models and commercial/professional build features.

quota_snapshot_examples.name: Tabnine Code Assistant / Agentic Platform
quota_snapshot_examples.quota_snapshot: Code Assistant annual subscription is $39/user/month; Agentic Platform annual subscription is $59/user/month and includes terminal-native Tabnine CLI / agentic workflows. Unlimited usage is available with customer-owned LLM endpoints; Tabnine-provided LLM access uses reserved token quota / provider prices plus handling fee.

excluded_examples.name: Sourcegraph Amp
excluded_examples.reason: Official pricing says there is no subscription or commitment and usage is deducted from credits at provider API cost; it should not be counted under the prompt's no pure API/pay-as-you-go constraint.

excluded_examples.name: SiliconFlow
excluded_examples.reason: Treat as a compute/model-service/API platform unless the executor finds a current fixed coding plan directly usable as a Claude Code provider. Generic model API billing or token packages do not count.

required_instruction_evidence: official Claude Code setup or Anthropic-compatible endpoint docs screenshot
official plan page screenshot showing monthly/subscription quota or credits
evidence that any counted compatible plan can be used directly as a Claude Code provider outside a product-only chat UI
evidence that product-only IDE/plugin/tool subscriptions were not counted as Claude Code provider plans
evidence that pure API/pay-as-you-go options were excluded from recommendations
prompt_alignment_note: Prompt excludes pure API/pay-as-you-go/compute-rental/model-gateway/API-aggregator options as final recommendations, requires at least 10 plans, and at least 3 China-related coding plans plus at least 3 plans usable directly as Claude Code providers.
